title: SECTION 101.4. Nuisance
text: No person shall discharge from any source whatsoever one or more air contaminants or combinations thereof, in such concentration and of such duration as are or may tend to be injurious to or to adversely affect human health or welfare, animal life, vegetation, or property, or as to interfere with the normal use and enjoyment of animal life, vegetation, or property.
source_note: The provisions of this §101.4 adopted to be effective January 1, 1976
